description: A vertical graphic with a darkened photograph of a tall steel border barrier and an American flag flying behind it. A very large white numeral '0' dominates the center. Below in bold white text with 'Last 6 Months' highlighted in green is the line 'Illegal Aliens Released into the U.S. in the Last 6 Months'. At the bottom is a small White House emblem and the text 'The WHITE HOUSE'.
notable_text: 0; Illegal Aliens Released into the U.S. in the Last 6 Months; The WHITE HOUSE
